summary.zh: 识别用户明确纠偏、负反馈、不满意或返工表达。
summary.en: Detects explicit user correction, negative feedback, dissatisfaction, or rework signals.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要判断一次 Agent 工作是否出现用户纠偏、负反馈或返工信号时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this when deciding whether an Agent run contains user correction, negative feedback, or rework signals.

limitations.zh: 强语气不一定代表任务失败，需要结合后续闭环、工具结果和上下文判断。
limitations.en: Strong wording does not always mean task failure; interpret it with later closure, tool results, and context.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的用户回合内容，不写入 raw private content。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope user turns and does not write raw private content.
